'''Mawin''' was a [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the fourth [[Mundi family|wife]] of [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi Mundi]] and the mother of Ki-Adi's daughter [[Sylvn (Cerean)|Sylvn]]. Even though the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]] forbade emotional attachments, the low Cerean male birthrate granted an exception. Ki-Adi was allowed not only to marry, but to keep the Cerean custom of [[polygamy]] as well. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Mawin perished during the [[Battle of Cerea]] between the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
